counters.description: poppy w, her 2 knock ups and her tankiness make this matchup completely unplayable. try to play around her w cooldown and don't get e'd into a wall.
has insane peel and ganks. jungle tracking very important. try to look for angles to take out carries. if you have to fight him, save empowered w for his taunt.
unmatchable ganks and insane cc in fights. track him at all times and countergank if possible.
after nerfs not as bad. lvl 1 invade really strong. jump over walls so she can't react to your burst.
reksai knock up completely stops your leap and it's impossible to match her ganks. jungle tracking is extremely important.
has insane ganks so make sure to give your teammates info on where he is at all times. ult can completely take you out of a fight if you're not in a bush. play around his e-q cooldown.
insane peel and tankiness. look for flanks on backline or save your w for her ult.
really strong early-mid game. w and q can completely negate your burst so play around cooldowns, jump over walls so he can't react, or lock him down with root for your team.
very strong in early duels. ult hardcounters you so edge of night can be very good. keep in mind your e reveals him in his w.
outranges you very hard and has insane peel with w and e. wait out her e or make sure you have 4 stacks after your leap in fights.
really disgusting to play into, important to try to avoid in teamfights, can cleanse his r and e.
insane ganks so make sure to let your teammates know where he is at all times. his ult can completely win a teamfight so be aware of ult angles. his wards completely block your ult vision.
has very insane clear and strong skirmishes. good to avoid in teamfights, your w can cleanse his e.
